fields.description: The user this calendar belongs to.
fields.label: User

fields.description: The ID of the calendar.
fields.label: ID

fields.description: The user-visible name of the calendar.
fields.label: Name

fields.description: An optional longer-form description of the calendar.
fields.label: Description

fields.description: A color to be used when displaying events associated with the calendar.
fields.label: Color

fields.description: Defines the sort order of calendars when presented in the client's UI.
fields.label: Sort Order

fields.description: Checked if the user has indicated they wish to see this Calendar in their client.
fields.label: Subscribed

fields.description: Should the calendar's events be displayed to the user at the moment?
fields.label: Visible

fields.description: This should be true for exactly one calendar in any account.
fields.label: Default

fields.description: What calendar's events be used as part of availability calculation?
fields.label: Include In Availability

fields.description: The time zone to use for events without a time zone.
fields.label: Time Zone

fields.description: The user may read the free-busy information for this calendar as part of a call to `Principal/getAvailability`.
fields.label: May Read Free Busy

fields.description: The user may fetch the events in this calendar.
fields.label: May Read Items

fields.description: The user may create, modify or destroy all events in this calendar, or move events to or from this calendar.
fields.label: May Write All

fields.description: The user may create, modify or destroy an event on this calendar if either they are the owner of the event or the event has no owner.
fields.label: May Write Own

fields.description: The user may modify per-user properties on all events in the calendar.
fields.label: May Update Private

fields.description: The user may modify the properties of any Participant object that corresponds to one of the user's Participant Identity objects in the account.
fields.label: May RSVP

fields.description: The user may modify the "shareWith" property for this calendar.
fields.label: May Admin

fields.description: The user may delete the calendar itself.
fields.label: May Delete

fields.description: The principals this calendar is shared with, and the access rights granted to each.
fields.label: Share With
